other: He applies {st:VibrationIgnition} with his S3. {st:VibrationExplosion} on his S2 (at 20+ {st:StigmaWorkshopHandStep1}) and S3.
He passively gains {st:Combustion} on himself from {st:StigmaWorkshopHandStep1}, but gets reduced damage from it.
If {id:11009} is below 50% HP at the start of a turn, Gregor gives him {st:RunSinclair} making him unkillable and forcing him to retreat at turn end.
usage: Passively gains {st:StigmaWorkshopHandStep1} when hitting enemies or using his defense, buffing his skills with {st:SuperCoin}s, {st:Combustion} application, and other effects. At 30 stacks, his S3 {skill:11216|03} and defense consume all stacks to upgrade to {skill:11216|05}.
His S3 applies 1-2 and his upgraded skill applies 3 turns of {st:DawnLight} to the party buffing {st:Combustion} skills with more damage and power.

Applies {st:DawnGregor} to {id:11009}, giving him less staggers, a stagger protection, a free S3 from stagger, SP support, free shield, {st:Combustion} application when hit, and triggering {st:FireField}. Upgrades to {st:DawnGregorDying}, which is a stronger version, when he dies.
When other Dawn Office identities stagger enemies or use their S3s or upgraded skills, he uses {skill:11216|01} as a follow up attack.

passiveBonusNotes: Assumes max stacks of Dawn Office.

1121601.desc:
When other Dawn Office[TabExplain] Identities meet the following conditions, Dawn Office[TabExplain] Rep Gregor uses the "Flash of Sunup" Skill against the targeted enemy (once per turn per Identity)
- At Base Skill Attack End: If the enemy that was hit is Staggered, use "Flash of Sunup" against said enemy
(Does not activate if the said enemy was already Staggered Before Attack of the said Skill)
- At Attack End of the following Skills, use "Flash of Sunup" on the enemy they hit (prioritizes Staggered targets):
  · Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Faust's "Eject", "Eject - High Noon[TabExplain]", and "Dismemberment at High Noon[TabExplain]"
  · Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Sinclair's "Stigmatize" and "Blazing[TabExplain] Strike"

If Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Sinclair is on the field: On Hit using Coins added to Dawn Office[TabExplain] Rep Gregor's Base Skills, deal additional Wrath damage equal to [Combustion] on targeted enemy (max 10; max 20 per turn)
- Counts as activating [Combustion]
1121601.name: Morgenfeuer [Stigma Workshop]

1121602.desc:
Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, gain 0 [StigmaWorkshopHandStep1]

Cannot be Staggered or fall below 1 HP due to [Combustion] damage
Take -50% damage from [Combustion] effects (rounded down)
- At less than 50% HP, take -75% damage from [Combustion] effects instead (rounded down)
1121602.name: The Fixer at the Crack of Dawn

1121603.desc:
Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, if there are 2+ allied Dawn Office[TabExplain] Identities (including this unit) on the field, apply [DawnTeam] Stack on all Dawn Office[TabExplain] Identities equal to the number of Dawn Office[TabExplain] Identities on the field

If Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Sinclair is on the field, activate the following effects:
- Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Sinclair gains [DawnGregor]
- Turn Start: If Dawn Office[TabExplain] Rep Gregor is defeated, convert [DawnGregor] on Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Sinclair into [DawnGregorDying]
- Turn Start: If Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Sinclair has less than 50% HP, apply [RunSinclair] on that unit (once per Encounter)
1121603.name: Dawn Office

1121611.desc:
When this unit has [DawnLight], gain 2 [StigmaWorkshopHandStep1] On Hit using Base Attack Skills

When other Dawn Office[TabExplain] Identities meet the following conditions, Dawn Office[TabExplain] Rep Gregor uses the "Flash of Sunup" Skill against the targeted enemy (once per turn per Identity)
- At Base Skill Attack End: If the enemy that was hit is Staggered, use "Flash of Sunup" against said enemy
(Does not activate if the said enemy was already Staggered Before Attack of the said Skill)
- At Attack End of the following Skills, use "Flash of Sunup" on the enemy they hit (prioritizes Staggered targets):
  · Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Faust's "Eject", "Eject - High Noon[TabExplain]", and "Dismemberment at High Noon[TabExplain]"
  · Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Sinclair's "Stigmatize" and "Blazing[TabExplain] Strike"

If Dawn Office[TabExplain] Fixer Sinclair is on the field: On Hit using Coins added to Dawn Office[TabExplain] Rep Gregor's Base Skills, deal additional Wrath damage equal to [Combustion] on the targeted enemy (max 10; max 20 per turn)
- Counts as activating [Combustion]
1121611.name: Morgenfeuer [Stigma Workshop]

1121621.desc:
The ally who has the highest current HP inflicts 2 [Vibration] On Hit against enemies that have [Combustion] (once per turn)
- If said enemy has 10+ [Combustion], trigger [VibrationExplosion] On final Coin Hit; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1 (once per turn)
1121621.name: Stigma Workshop Prosthesis

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1

data.desc:
[StartBattle] Apply 2 [Protection] on 2 random other allies
(prioritize allies that do not have [Protection]; among them, prioritize Dawn Office[TabExplain] allies)
[BeforeUse] At 30 [StigmaWorkshopHandStep1], activate "Crack of Dawn" instead (once per turn)
[WhenUse] At 20+ [StigmaWorkshopHandStep1], activate the following effects:
- Final Power +1
- Convert all Coins in this Skill into [SuperCoin]s
[EndSkill] Apply 1 [DawnLight] next turn on all allies
- At 20+ [StigmaWorkshopHandStep1], apply 1 additional [DawnLight]
data.name: Dawnsplitter

data.desc:
Deal +([Combustion] on self + [Combustion] on target)% damage (max 30%)
[StartBattle] Apply 2 [Protection] on 2 random other allies
(prioritize allies that do not have [Protection]; among them, prioritize Dawn Office[TabExplain] allies)
[BeforeUse] At 30 [StigmaWorkshopHandStep1], activate "Crack of Dawn" instead (once per turn)
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 6 ([Combustion] + [Vibration]) on target (max 2)
[WhenUse] At 20+ [StigmaWorkshopHandStep1], activate the following effects:
- Final Power +1
- Convert all Coins in this Skill into [SuperCoin]s
- On final Coin Hit, activate [Combustion] on target; then, reduce target's [Combustion] Count by 1
[EndSkill] Apply 1 [DawnLight] next turn on all allies
- At 20+ [StigmaWorkshopHandStep1], apply 1 additional [DawnLight]
data.name: Dawnsplitter

- Consume up to 15 [Combustion] on self and heal (15 + [Combustion] consumed)% HP
- Consume all [StigmaWorkshopHandStep1] on self
